name: dlsforge-monorepo
description: npm-workspaces root for the DLSForge packages: @dlsforge/aegov-rules-core, @dlsforge/aegov-mcp, @dlsforge/aegov-audit. Community project. Not affiliated with or endorsed by TDRA.
author: Alam Khan Durrani

scripts.build: npm run build -w @dlsforge/aegov-rules-core && npm run build -w @dlsforge/aegov-mcp && npm run build -w @dlsforge/aegov-audit
scripts.test: npm run test -w @dlsforge/aegov-rules-core && npm run test -w @dlsforge/aegov-mcp && npm run test -w @dlsforge/aegov-audit
